news.paragraph: Tesla is experiencing volatility as investors weigh its AI chip pivot and a $250 million investment in German battery cells against recent robotaxi glitches and battery delays. While AI-driven optimism has previously sparked surges, the stock recently fell 5% amid concerns over Elon Musk's trip to China and broader geopolitical tensions. Traders should monitor robotaxi development and battery production progress as key upcoming catalysts.
